use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in dashboards and settings pages
Showing user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Representing users in navigation headers or sidebars
Displaying sender avatars in messaging or chat interfaces
User identification in card components or data tables
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with support for images and fallback initials. Provides a rounded, responsive user representation element with proper accessibility attributes inherited from Radix. Includes Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback sub-components for handling loading states and missing images gracefully.
